title: SPA Yield Lab — Strategy Card
description: A comparable, auditable record for one yield strategy. Research-layer artifact; not runtime data; never read by the deterministic RiskPolicy or execution path. All APY/TVL/capacity numbers are placeholders requiring verification until sourced with an evidence level. See docs/11_strategy_card_system.md, docs/07 (lifecycle), docs/37 (APY evidence L0-L6), docs/14 (advisory Risk Scoring v2).

apy_range.description: An APY range. Values default to null / 'TBD - requires verification' until sourced.

low.description: Low end of the APY range (decimal or percent per project convention). null when TBD.

high.description: High end of the APY range. null when TBD.

verification_note.description: Source / last-verified date, or 'TBD - requires verification'.

score_0_100.description: Advisory sub-score in [0,100]. Advisory only (Risk Scoring v2, docs/14); never a hard gate. null until computed.

strategy_id.description: Stable unique id, e.g. SC-0001. Never reused.

version.description: Card version (e.g. '1.0'); bumps on material edits.

category.description: Coarse family: lending, rwa, basis, carry, lp, restaking, leverage, options, etc.

product_line.description: Product line the card is TARGETED at. Approval is separate (approved_for_product_line).

protocols_used.description: Protocols depended on; cross-reference Protocol Cards (docs/12).

yield_source.description: One line: where the yield comes from.

yield_mechanism.description: Mechanism detail: lending spread, funding basis, RWA coupon, emissions, points, etc.

who_pays_the_yield.description: The counterparty actually paying the yield.

why_yield_exists.description: Economic reason this yield is available.

why_yield_can_disappear.description: Failure/compression modes that end the yield.

expected_apy_range.description: Expected forward APY. TBD - requires verification by default.

observed_apy_range.description: Observed (paper/backtest/live) APY. Must carry an evidence level.

incentive_apy.description: Incentive/emissions portion of APY. TBD until sourced.

sustainable_apy_estimate.description: APY expected to persist after incentives/compression. TBD until sourced.

apy_evidence_level.description: APY evidence level (docs/37). L0 idea/unverified, L1 historical public observed, L2 data-source verified, L3 paper-tracked, L4 small-capital tested, L5 live-capital tested, L6 multi-cycle validated. No APY treated as verified below this level.

floor_baseline_pct.description: The LIVE RWA floor used to evaluate this card (ADR-YL-008). Source data/rwa_feed.py; NEVER hardcoded. fallback_used flags the committed-literal fail-closed path.

spread_over_floor_bps.description: (sustainable/observed APY - live floor) in bps. The quantity judged (ADR-YL-008). TBD until sourced.

spread_risk_explanation.description: Itemized mapping of spread -> specific, accepted, measurable risks (ADR-YL-008). The bps should sum to spread_over_floor_bps.

unexplained_spread_bps.description: Residual = spread_over_floor_bps - sum(spread_risk_explanation.bps). Treated as unpriced tail risk, not alpha (ADR-YL-008).

spread_fully_explained.description: True only if unexplained_spread_bps <= tolerance. A card CANNOT advance to Enhanced/MaxYield while false (=> REJECT, logged in the refusal log). ADR-YL-008.

confidence_score.description: Advisory confidence in the card's own inputs/data.

risk_score.description: Advisory overall risk (higher = riskier per docs/14). Advisory only.

capacity_estimate.description: Approx capital absorbable before APY compresses / slippage bites. TBD - requires verification.

min_capital.description: Minimum sensible allocation. TBD until sourced.

max_capital.description: Maximum sensible allocation. TBD until sourced.

suitable_capital_tiers.description: Capital tiers this fits; cross-ref docs/34.

withdrawal_time.description: Expected time to exit to cash.

stablecoin_risk.description: Depeg/redemption/reserve risk if a stablecoin is involved.

counterparty_risk.description: Reliance on a specific counterparty (CEX, issuer, market maker).

key_dependencies.description: External things that must hold (a peg, a CEX leg, an oracle, an incentive program).

assumptions.description: Stated assumptions the thesis rests on.

emergency_exit_conditions.description: Conditions that force an emergency exit.

monitoring_requirements.description: What must be monitored while the position is open.

data_sources_required.description: Feeds/data the strategy depends on (must be real, cited).

validation_status.description: Where the strategy is in validation (mirrors lifecycle).

approved_for_product_line.description: Product line the card is APPROVED for (may lag product_line target). null until human-approved.

final_recommendation.description: Reviewer recommendation: approve / reject / defer / research-only.

max_allocation.description: Advisory max allocation if approved. Never overrides RiskPolicy caps.

review_frequency.description: How often the card must be re-reviewed, e.g. 'weekly', 'monthly'.

owner.description: Human owner accountable for the card.

status.description: Yield Lab lifecycle status (docs/07). Distinct from approved_for_product_line.
